engineIntelligence.h2: Cadillac CTS-V Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the supercharged 6.2L V8 engines fitted to the Cadillac CTS-V in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Cadillac CTS-V LSA engine - petrol 6.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Supercharger bearing wear - rattling noise from blower unit, typically 60k-100k miles.
Intercooler pump failure - causes heat soak and reduced power mode on high-mileage units.
Valve lifter collapse - AFM-related lifter tick leading to camshaft damage if ignored.

cards.altText: Cadillac CTS-V LT4 engine - petrol 6.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: High-pressure fuel injector failure - causes misfires, rough idle and lean codes on LT4 units.
Piston ring land wear - oil consumption and smoke on heavily driven or tuned examples.
Supercharger lid gasket leak - intercooler brick failure leading to coolant loss.

cards.altText: Cadillac CTS-V supercharged V8 drivetrain - petrol 6.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain stretch - high-mileage wear on both LSA and LT4, causes cam correlation codes.
Crankshaft harmonic balancer separation - LSA-specific pulley wobble at 80k+ miles.
Oil consumption - piston ring wear on hard-driven supercharged V8 units.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £12,000-£20,000 (supply only) Estimated from comparable LSA/LT4 units - actual quotes may vary.

commonProblems.h2: Cadillac CTS-V Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Cadillac CTS-V's supercharged 6.2L V8 engines (LSA and LT4) are powerful but demand specialist care. Supercharger bearing wear on LSA units and fuel injector failure on LT4 engines dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: LSA Supercharger Bearing Failure - Why Early CTS-V Engines Develop Rattles
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac CTS-V Saloon, Coupe, Wagon (2009-2015, LSA 6.2L Supercharged)
problems.rootCause: Eaton supercharger snout bearings wear from heat and high boost pressure, causing internal rattling and eventual seizure if ignored.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove supercharger, replace snout bearings and seals, reassemble and test
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before rotor damage; not suitable if knocking present

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full supercharger disassembly, new bearings, rotors inspected/replaced, gaskets renewed
repairOptions.longevity: Extends supercharger life significantly; recommended if engine otherwise healthy

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt LSA engine with upgraded components, supply & fit, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage cars or when engine damage has occurred beyond supercharger

problems.recommendation: If your LSA supercharger is rattling but the engine runs smoothly, a specialist supercharger rebuild offers excellent value. However, if you hear bottom-end knocking or have high mileage, investing in a full rebuilt engine with upgraded internals provides long-term peace of mind and better resale value.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt LSA engine prices for your Cadillac CTS-V

problems.h4: LT4 Fuel Injector Failure - Common Issue on Later CTS-V Models
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac CTS-V Saloon, Coupe (2016-2019, LT4 6.2L Supercharged)
problems.rootCause: High-pressure direct injection fuel injectors can clog or fail electrically, causing misfires, rough idle and lean fuel trim codes under load.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace faulty injector, recalibrate fuel trims, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable for isolated injector failure on otherwise healthy engine

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all eight injectors, high-pressure pump inspection, full system flush
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if multiple injectors show wear or car has high mileage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt LT4 with upgraded injectors and components, supply & fit, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best option if injector failure caused piston damage or engine has other wear issues

problems.recommendation: For a single faulty injector on a low-mileage LT4, replacement is cost-effective. However, if your CTS-V has covered significant miles or shows signs of multiple injector wear, upgrading to a full rebuilt engine with enhanced components often proves more economical long-term.
problems.cta: Get quotes for LT4 engine replacement for your Cadillac CTS-V

problems.h4: LSA Valve Lifter Collapse - AFM-Related Failure on High-Mileage Units
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac CTS-V Saloon, Coupe, Wagon (2009-2015, LSA 6.2L Supercharged)
problems.rootCause: Active Fuel Management lifters can collapse due to oil pressure issues or wear, causing valve train noise and potential camshaft scoring.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, replace collapsed lifters, inspect camshaft, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if camshaft is undamaged; requires precise diagnosis

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all lifters and camshaft, renew timing components, full valve train service
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended when cam scoring is present; prevents repeat failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt LSA with upgraded lifters, cam, and internals, supply & fit, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage engines or when bottom-end damage is suspected

problems.recommendation: If lifter tick is caught early with no cam damage, lifter replacement can be economical. However, given the labour-intensive nature of the repair, many owners find a full rebuilt engine with upgraded components offers better long-term value and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare LSA valve train repair vs replacement costs for your CTS-V

problems.h4: LT4 Piston Ring Land Failure - Oil Consumption on Tuned or Hard-Driven Cars
problems.affectedModels: Cadillac CTS-V Saloon, Coupe (2016-2019, LT4 6.2L Supercharged)
problems.rootCause: High cylinder pressures from supercharging combined with aggressive driving or tuning can cause piston ring land fatigue, leading to oil consumption and compression loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Piston ring failure usually requires major engine work; no preventative minor fix exists
Replace short block with rebuilt unit, transfer cylinder heads and accessories
repairOptions.longevity: Suitable if cylinder heads and supercharger are in good condition

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Complete rebuilt LT4 with forged pistons and upgraded internals, supply & fit, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for tuned cars or when seeking maximum reliability and performance

problems.recommendation: Piston ring failure on the LT4 typically warrants a full rebuilt engine, especially for tuned or performance-driven CTS-Vs. Upgraded forged internals in a remanufactured unit provide the durability needed for high-boost applications and deliver better long-term value.
problems.cta: Find LT4 piston upgrade options for your Cadillac CTS-V

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Cadillac CTS-V
finalCta.paragraph: The supercharged 6.2L V8 in your CTS-V is a remarkable performance engine, but when problems arise, specialist knowledge is essential. EngineMarket connects you with UK specialists who understand LSA and LT4 failure patterns, offering rebuilt engines with upgraded components that address the original weak points. With nationwide supply & fit available and every unit backed by a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, you can restore your CTS-V's performance without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Cadillac CTS-V Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Cadillac CTS-V and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Cadillac CTS-V Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Cadillac CTS-V production timeline (2009-2019), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Gen 2 Launch: LSA Supercharged V8 Debuts
years.description: The second-generation CTS-V launched with the supercharged 6.2L LSA V8, establishing the model's performance credentials with 556hp.
keyChanges: Introduction of supercharged LSA 6.2L V8 replacing previous naturally aspirated units
Available in Saloon body style only for first two model years
Tremec TR6060 6-speed manual or 6L90E 6-speed automatic transmission options
knownFor: Strong low-end torque from Eaton supercharger
Early supercharger bearing wear reports on high-mileage examples
High demand for specialist fitting due to complex supercharger plumbing

years.preview: Generation Transition: Final LSA and First LT4 Models

Updated styling, chassis refinements and increased output to 640hp

faq.h2: Cadillac CTS-V Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Cadillac CTS-V engine in the UK?
items.answer: Replacing a Cadillac CTS-V supercharged V8 engine typically costs £8,500-£18,000 for a rebuilt unit supply-only, depending on whether you have the LSA (2009-2015) or LT4 (2016-2019) engine code.
keyPoints: LSA engine replacements range £8,500-£15,000 rebuilt supply-only
LT4 units cost £10,000-£18,000 due to direct injection complexity
Supply & fit service typically adds £1,500-£3,000 labour cost
All prices include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare rebuilt LSA and LT4 engine prices for your Cadillac CTS-V

items.question: Where can I buy a Cadillac CTS-V engine in the UK?
items.answer: Specialist engine rebuilders and performance garages across the UK supply rebuilt LSA and LT4 engines for the Cadillac CTS-V, with EngineMarket connecting you to vetted suppliers.
keyPoints: EngineMarket's network includes CTS-V specialist rebuilders nationwide
All suppliers provide rebuilt, reconditioned or remanufactured options
DVLA registration lookup ensures correct engine code matching
Quotes include warranty terms and supply & fit availability
items.cta: Find trusted Cadillac CTS-V engine suppliers near you

items.question: Can you rebuild an LSA engine or is replacement better?
items.answer: LSA engines can be rebuilt, but for high-mileage CTS-Vs or those with supercharger bearing failure, a full rebuilt engine with upgraded internals often offers better long-term value than partial repair.
keyPoints: Supercharger bearing service costs £1,500-£2,800 specialist price
Full rebuilt LSA engine £8,500-£15,000 addresses all wear points
Rebuilt units include upgraded components preventing repeat failures
12-month warranty on rebuilt engines provides peace of mind
items.cta: Compare LSA rebuild vs replacement costs for your CTS-V

items.question: Is the LT4 engine in the Cadillac CTS-V reliable?
items.answer: The LT4 is fundamentally robust but has known failure points including fuel injectors and piston rings on high-mileage or tuned examples, making warranty coverage essential when purchasing a replacement.
keyPoints: LT4 direct injection system requires specialist diagnostic equipment
Fuel injector failure common between 40k-80k miles on hard-driven cars
Piston ring upgrades recommended for tuned or track-used vehicles
Rebuilt LT4 engines with enhanced internals improve long-term reliability
items.cta: Get quotes for LT4 engine replacement with upgraded components

items.question: What engine fits the Cadillac CTS-V?
items.answer: Only the supercharged 6.2L LSA (2009-2015) or LT4 (2016-2019) V8 engines are direct-fit replacements for the Cadillac CTS-V; cross-generation swaps require significant modification.
keyPoints: LSA and LT4 share block architecture but have different internals
Direct injection on LT4 requires compatible ECU and fuel system
Transmission compatibility: 6L90E for LSA, 8L90E for LT4
EngineMarket's DVLA lookup ensures correct code matching
items.cta: Verify your CTS-V engine code before ordering replacement

items.question: How long does a Cadillac CTS-V engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, LSA and LT4 engines can exceed 100,000 miles, but supercharger bearings (LSA) and fuel injectors (LT4) often require attention between 60k-90k miles on performance-driven examples.
keyPoints: Regular oil changes with correct specification critical for longevity
Supercharger coolant system maintenance prevents heat-related failures
Avoiding aggressive tuning extends piston and ring life on LT4 units
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components can match or exceed original lifespan
items.cta: Find high-mileage CTS-V engine maintenance specialists

items.question: What warranty comes with a Cadillac CTS-V replacement engine?
items.answer: All Cadillac CTS-V engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some specialists offering extended 24-month coverage on remanufactured units.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt engines
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Supply & fit installations include workmanship warranty
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
items.cta: Compare warranty terms on CTS-V engine replacement quotes

items.question: What's the difference between LSA and LT4 engines in the CTS-V?
items.answer: The LT4 is an evolution of the LSA with direct injection, higher compression and increased output (640hp vs 556hp), but requires different fuel system components and ECU calibration.
keyPoints: LSA uses port injection; LT4 uses direct injection technology
LT4 produces 640hp vs LSA's 556hp with improved torque curve
LT4 requires higher-octane fuel and more frequent injector maintenance
Replacement engines must match your vehicle's original engine code
items.cta: Compare LSA and LT4 engine specifications for your CTS-V

items.question: Can I fit an LT4 engine to an older LSA-powered CTS-V?
items.answer: Swapping an LT4 into an LSA CTS-V requires extensive modification including ECU, wiring harness, fuel system and potentially transmission updates, making it a specialist project rather than direct replacement.
keyPoints: Direct injection fuel system requires high-pressure pump and lines
ECU and wiring harness are not cross-compatible between generations
Transmission controller differences between 6L90E and 8L90E
Specialist consultation recommended before attempting cross-generation swap
items.cta: Speak to a CTS-V engine swap specialist about LT4 conversion

items.question: What causes Cadillac CTS-V engine failure?
items.answer: Most CTS-V engine failures stem from supercharger bearing wear (LSA), fuel injector failure (LT4), or valve train issues on high-mileage units, often accelerated by aggressive driving or inadequate maintenance.
keyPoints: Supercharger bearing failure causes rattling noise and eventual seizure
LT4 injector failure leads to misfires and potential piston damage
Oil consumption from ring wear indicates need for rebuild or replacement
Early diagnosis and specialist intervention can prevent catastrophic failure
items.cta: Diagnose your CTS-V engine problem and get replacement quotes
